currentState: Immediate professional alignment. Corin has been drowning in ignored evidence; Jaina arrives, understands the work at once, and starts using it instead of questioning whether it should exist.
powerDynamic: Jaina has senior authority, synthesis, and the confidence to act on the findings. Corin provides the local records, access, and patient accumulation of proof she needs to move fast inside the city.

physicalDynamics.pattern: He has the file already in his hands when she arrives, and she takes his pages standing up, reading faster than the bureaucracy ever did.

nameUsage.jainaCallsCorin: Corin immediately, in brisk collegial form.
nameUsage.corinCallsJaina: Proudmoore at first, the respectful address of a junior mage finally speaking to someone senior enough to matter.

history.event: Jaina becomes the first person to treat Corin's copied manifests, tied-lattice tests, and ignored notices as the beginning of an answer instead of a nuisance.

trajectory: Institutional isolation -> competent local alliance with the first hint of mentorship.
